problem_text_cn: 1423 用粒子轰击氢原子使其激发，使氢原子发出Hₐ谱线（$n=3\to n=2$跃迁），求下列情况下粒子的最小动能：(1) 电子与室温下的氢原子相碰撞；(2) 质子轰击原先静止的基态氢原子；(3) 质子与基态氢原子以相等速率相互趋近发生对心碰撞。
problem_text_en: 1423 Bombard hydrogen atoms with particles to excite them, causing Hₐ line emission ($n=3\to n=2$ transition). Find the minimum kinetic energy of the particle in: (1) Electron collision with room-temperature hydrogen atoms; (2) Proton collision with initially stationary ground-state hydrogen; (3) Head-on collision of proton and ground-state hydrogen approaching at equal speeds.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】Hₐ谱线对应氢原子从$n=1$激发到$n=3$，所需激发能$\Delta E = E_3 - E_1 = 12.09\ \mathrm{eV}$。利用约化质量$\mu = \frac{mM}{m+M}$，最大激发能$\Delta E_{\text{max}} = \frac{1}{2}\mu v_{\text{相对}}^2$，分别计算三种碰撞下的最小动能。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Hₐ line corresponds to excitation from $n=1$ to $n=3$, requiring $\Delta E = E_3 - E_1 = 12.09\ \mathrm{eV}$. Using reduced mass $\mu = \frac{mM}{m+M}$, maximum excitation energy $\Delta E_{\text{max}} = \frac{1}{2}\mu v_{\text{relative}}^2$, calculate minimum KE for each collision case.
problem_answer: (1) 电子最小动能$\boldsymbol{12.09\ \mathrm{eV}}$；(2) 质子最小动能$\boldsymbol{24.18\ \mathrm{eV}}$；(3) 质子最小动能$\boldsymbol{6.05\ \mathrm{eV}}$。
